title: Insurance and Annuities Management: Workers' Compensation
description: Conroe ISD maintains workers' compensation coverage to support district employees who are injured or become ill as a result of their jobs. The policy outlines how the district manages these insurance benefits and the process employees follow when filing a work-related injury claim. While this policy primarily affects district staff, it helps ensure that the people who work with students every day are protected and supported, which contributes to a stable and well-staffed learning environment.
